---
title: "Kun Qian"
subtitle: |
    Assistant Professor \
    University of Virginia
image: "files/avatar/kunqian_2024.jpg"
about:
    id: pi-info
    template: trestles
    image-shape: round
listing:
    - id: latest-news
      contents: 
        - news/*.yml
      type: grid
      max-items: 3
      fields: [image, date, title, description]
      max-description-length: 500
      sort:
        - "date desc"
        - "title desc"
date-format: "MMM, YYYY"
page-layout: full
toc: false
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#pi-info}

Kun Qian is an Assistant Professor in the [Department of Computer Science](https://cs.virginia.edu) at the University of Virginia. He is also a faculty member of the UVA's [Link Lab](https://linklab.virginia.edu). Previously, he was a postdoctoral researcher at the University of California San Diego, where he worked with Prof. [Xinyu Zhang](http://xyzhang.ucsd.edu/). 

His research interests lie in the wireless and mobile technologies that enable ambient intelligence and ubiquitous connectivity. He has designed wireless models, algorithms, and systems, with applications across a wide spectrum of physical-aware scenarios, including next-generation communication, smart IoT sensing, autonomous driving, and mobile computing.

## Education

- Tsinghua University | Sept 2014 - Jan 2019
    - Ph.D. in Software Engineering 
    - Advisors: Prof. [Yunhao Liu](https://people.gix.tsinghua.edu.cn/yunhao/en.html) and Prof. [Zheng Yang](https://tns.thss.tsinghua.edu.cn/~yangzheng/)

- Tsinghua University | Sept 2010 - June 2014
    - B.Sc. in Software Engineering

:::

## Latest News

:::{#latest-news}
:::

<p align="right">[News Archive »](news.qmd)</p>
